root.rep_text: รายงานแสดงการกู้ตามวัตถุประสงค์ ตามประเภทเงินกู้

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code, sum( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) as loan_approve_amount, sum( sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve ) as real_receive FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) /*and ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between :adt_datefrom and :adt_dateto ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = :as_loantype*/ /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description ORDER BY sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ASC, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description ASC
